widget.name: Excel Workbook Widget
widget.description: Excel-like spreadsheet widget. Place inside a DataView of the Spreadsheet entity. Reads and writes cell data via sheetJson attribute.

property.caption: Sheet JSON
property.description: Map to Spreadsheet.sheetJson (String, Unlimited length). Stores cell data for this sheet as JSON. Widget writes updated JSON back here on every cell change.

property.caption: All Sheets JSON
property.description:
Map to Workbook.allSheetsJson (String, Unlimited length). Contains ALL sheets data for this workbook as a JSON array. Used by HyperFormula to resolve cross-sheet references like =Revenue!A1.
Expected format: [ { "sheetId": "1", "sheetName": "Revenue", "data": [[1,2],[3,4]] }, { "sheetId": "2", "sheetName": "Expenses", "data": [[5,6],[7,8]] } ]
Built by Mendix microflow ACT_Workbook_BuildAllSheetsJson. Called on page load and after every sheet save.
If not provided, widget falls back to single-sheet mode.

property.caption: Current User ID
property.description: Expression returning the current logged-in user's ID. Example: toString($currentUser)

property.caption: Access Record User ID
property.description: Expression returning the user ID from the WorkBookAccess record. Example: toString($currentObject/WorkBookAccess_Account)

property.caption: Permission Type
property.description: Expression returning the permission from WorkBookAccess. Expected values: "Edit" or "View"

property.caption: Is Admin
property.description: Expression returning true if current user is an admin. Admins get full access — overrides permissionType completely.

property.caption: On Sheet Change (Auto-Save)
property.description: Fired after every cell edit (debounced 800ms). Wire to a microflow that commits the Spreadsheet object AND rebuilds allSheetsJson on the Workbook.

property.caption: On Audit Log
property.description: Action to be triggered for Audit logs.

property.caption: Grid Height (px)
property.description: Height of the spreadsheet grid in pixels.

property.caption: Row Count
property.description: Number of rows to show in the grid. Default is 50.

property.caption: Show Formatting Toolbar
property.description: Show bold, italic, color, merge toolbar.

property.caption: Show Sheet Name Header
property.description: Show sheet name above the grid.

property.caption: Show Row Numbers
property.description: Show row numbers on the left (1, 2, 3…)

property.caption: Show Column Letters
property.description: Show column letters on top (A, B, C…)
